occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Manage project execution to ensure adherence to budget, schedule, and scope.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Confer with project personnel to identify and resolve problems.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Monitor or track project milestones and deliverables.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Submit project deliverables, ensuring adherence to quality standards.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Assess current or future customer needs and priorities by communicating directly with customers, conducting surveys, or other methods.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Initiate, review, or approve modifications to project plans.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Schedule and facilitate meetings related to information technology projects.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Direct or coordinate activities of project personnel.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Develop implementation plans that include analyses such as cost-benefit or return on investment (ROI).

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Identify need for initial or supplemental project resources.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Develop or update project plans for information technology projects including information such as project objectives, technologies, systems, information specifications, schedules, funding, and staffing.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Perform risk assessments to develop response strategies.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Prepare project status reports by collecting, analyzing, and summarizing information and trends.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Identify, review, or select vendors or consultants to meet project needs.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Develop and manage annual budgets for information technology projects.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Establish and execute a project communication plan.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Develop and manage work breakdown structure (WBS) of information technology projects.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Monitor the performance of project team members, providing and documenting performance feedback.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Coordinate recruitment or selection of project personnel.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Assign duties, responsibilities, and spans of authority to project personnel.

occupation_label: Project Management Specialists / Information Project Managers
onet_task_text: Negotiate with project stakeholders or suppliers to obtain resources or materials.
